tagline: A curated reference of 300 essential contractor tools across six trades.

tools.name: Procore
tools.description: An all-in-one construction management software needed for improving communication and project tracking.
tools.pricingNote: Annual contracts; pricing is custom and scales with project volume.
pros: Construction management software needed for improving communication and project tracking.
Purpose-built for projectmanagement workflows.
Tuned to the way gc contractors actually operate.
Scales to multi-office operations without breaking down at higher volume.
cons: Pricing is enterprise — not designed for solo operators.
Requires admin time to configure for your trade-specific workflow.
Overhead can outweigh value at very small scale.
